package middleware

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for body_binding_done_in_middleware_and_handler: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Endpoints where middleware parses the body and the handler also owns body binding.
type CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerModel
}

type CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerDTO) error {
    middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
        return func(inner *gin.Context) {
            var midReq CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerDTO
            inner.ShouldBindJSON(&midReq)
            inner.Set("parsed", midReq)
            next(inner)
        }
    }
    var handlerReq CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerDTO
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&handlerReq); err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
        return nil
    }
    _ = middleware
    db.Where("id = ?", handlerReq.ID).Find(&[]CaseBodyBindingDoneInMiddlewareAndHandlerModel{})
    return nil
}
